benefits.description: No notable benefits described; used for body composition, recovery, and healthy aging

side_effects.description: Occasional mild itching at injection site during weeks 1-3; progressed to inflammation and itching at injection sites weeks 4-8; prior injection sites swelled into bumps (4 bumps on abdomen) at week 10
Severe mast cell activation event at week 10: intense itching all over lower abdomen and back, severe abdominal and uterine cramping radiating down legs and into lower back, lasting several hours

protocol_notes: Compounded sermorelin from a single vial used over 10 weeks (provider indicated 3-month use was safe). OP also used CJC+Ipamorelin in a prior cycle and experienced localized reactions around weeks 6-7, with visible injection site irritation by week 8, discontinuing around week 10. Currently on testosterone/estrogen pellets and micronized progesterone. Red wine consumed evening of the severe reaction. Post-reaction mast cell recovery protocol: Quercetin 500mg 2x/day, Vitamin C 1000mg/day, Magnesium glycinate, Zyrtec daily x3-5 days, low-histamine diet.
